message:
chore(gitignore): narrow test_*.rs re-include and ignore atc-bench / target-local / target-review dirs

Three refinements to stop the agent-generated scratch detritus from
showing up in `git status` after every review-swarm pass.

1. Root-level `test_*.rs` scratch files were re-included by the
   broad `!test_*.rs` exception on line 300. That exception exists
   so new legitimate test files under `crates/*/tests/` or
   `tests/` keep being tracked, but it also caught the one-off
   agent-generated scratch files dropped at repo root (test_bug.rs,
   test_dotenv.rs, test_glob.rs, etc.). Narrow the re-include to
   `!*/**/test_*.rs` and `!*/**/test_*.sh` so it only applies at
   least one directory level deep — root-level test_*.{rs,sh}
   scratch files now stay ignored. Checked via `git check-ignore`
   against the three tracked `test_*.rs` files (test_db.rs,
   test_harness.rs, test_panic.rs) — all still legitimately
   tracked.

2. `atc-bench*/` — the atc-bench harness generates random-suffix
   output dirs (atc-bench.RbEZrq/, atc-bench20.jZ69NU/,
   atc-bench50.9K0Mhf/, etc.) per run. They were piling up as
   untracked after every benchmark invocation. One pattern line
   catches all of them.

3. `target-local-*/` and `target-review-*/` — agents sometimes
   build into these alias target dirs to keep a known-good
   release binary separate from the main cargo target. They are
   always local-only; the existing `.cargo-target-*/` /
   `target-codex*/` / `target-rch*/` / etc. ignores cover similar
   alias dirs but missed these two variants.

Verified: `git check-ignore -v` now reports the correct
ignore-source for every previously-untracked ephemeral file.

files.patch:
@@ -297,8 +297,18 @@ test_dotenv
 test_env_read
 test_guard
 test_*
-!test_*.rs
-!test_*.sh
+# Re-include real test_*.rs / test_*.sh files in subdirectories
+# (e.g. crates/*/tests/, tests/), but keep root-level `test_*.rs`
+# scratch files ignored — those are always agent-generated.
+!*/**/test_*.rs
+!*/**/test_*.sh
+
+# Ephemeral benchmark output dirs (random-suffixed per run by atc-bench harness)
+atc-bench*/
+
+# Local cargo target aliases used for side-by-side builds
+target-local-*/
+target-review-*/
 
 # NTM (agent tmux orchestrator) runtime state — per-machine churn, never tracked.
 # (Session summaries under .ntm/summaries/ are historical handoff records
